Aggregation rule: Each registered positive/null ladder row keeps its expected route; seed/split aggregation is already resolved in CP-Q3 artifacts.
Relationship to job matrix: Derived from CP-Q3 synthetic-control artifacts and cross-checked by CP-Q6 metrics.

Aggregation rule: Each CP-R1 context-utility row becomes one route decision; the score/gate evidence is not majority-voted from CP-Q6 jobs.
Relationship to job matrix: Derived from CP-R1 route artifacts and cross-linked to CP-Q6 metric tables.

Aggregation rule: Each rejected/access-blocked dataset-card row becomes one abstain decision with an access/schema reason.
Relationship to job matrix: Not part of the 2,324 executed jobs; retained as evidence-denominator ledger rows.

Aggregation rule: Execution jobs are not collapsed directly into the 100 route decisions; they supply metric, skip, and robustness evidence.
Relationship to job matrix: 2324 completed jobs, 436 skipped jobs, and 34860 metric rows.
